Package com.rays.form

Class FacultyForm

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseForm
      • com.rays.form.FacultyForm
  • public class FacultyForm
extends BaseForm
    FacultyForm is a form class used for capturing faculty-related data. This class extends BaseForm and contains fields for faculty details with validation constraints.

    This form is used to collect and validate faculty information such as personal details (name, DOB, gender, phone, email, qualification) and associated college, course, and subject information before converting it to a FacultyDTO object for database operations.

    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

      Gets the course ID taught by the faculty member.

      Gets the course name taught by the faculty member.

      • getDto

        public BaseDTO getDto()
        Converts the form data to a FacultyDTO object. This method initializes a DTO using the parent class method and populates it with form field values.
        Overrides:
        getDto in class BaseForm
        Returns:
        the populated FacultyDTO object
